description: Style NotePared down to the basics, this kurta from diva is just right for a layered boho chic or a simple off-to-college vibe. Add a splash of colourful jewellery for an interesting dimension. The simple silhouette and the minimal design details will balance the brighter accessories.Product DetailsOrange kurta, has a round neck with sequins, has three quarter sleeves and side slitsMaterial and CareBlended fabricMachine washWash dark colours separatelyDry in shadeWarm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8” and chest 33”) is wearing size S
